description: Update Storybook stories for PluginIcon, ToolIcon, and ToolRow to showcase the new activity dot indicator

userStories.title: Add Active stories to PluginIcon, ToolIcon, and verify ToolRow stories still work
userStories.description: As a developer, I want Storybook stories updated to showcase the new activity dot behavior on ToolIcon and PluginIcon, and verify the updated ToolRow stories work without the Loader, so the component library accurately reflects the current UI
acceptanceCriteria: PluginIcon.stories.tsx has a new 'Active' story with active={true} and tabState='ready'
PluginIcon.stories.tsx has a new 'ActiveFadeOut' story or note showing the fade-out behavior (can use an interactive wrapper that toggles active after a delay)
ToolIcon.stories.tsx has a new 'Active' story with active={true}
ToolIcon.stories.tsx has a new 'ActiveDisabled' story with active={true} and enabled={false} to show the dot appears even on disabled tools
ToolRow.stories.tsx Active story still renders correctly (active prop flows to ToolIcon, showing the green dot instead of the old Loader)
ToolRow.stories.tsx ToolList story still renders correctly with one active tool showing the green dot
userStories.notes:
Three story files to update. All are in `platform/browser-extension/src/side-panel/components/`.

## PluginIcon.stories.tsx

Current exports: Ready, Unavailable, Closed, ReadyWithUpdate, Palette, Sizes, WithIcon, WithIconInactive.

Add a new story after the existing ones:
```ts
const Active: Story = {
  args: { pluginName: 'slack', displayName: 'Slack', tabState: 'ready', size: 32, active: true },
};
```

Add `Active` to the exports.

The `active` prop was added to PluginIconProps in the activity-indicator-dots work (already merged to main). It flashes the green ready dot with `animate-activity-flash` when true.

## ToolIcon.stories.tsx

Current exports: Default, WithIcon, Mail, Search, Gallery.

Add new stories:
```ts
const Active: Story = { args: { icon: 'send', active: true } };
const ActiveDisabled: Story = { args: { icon: 'send', enabled: false, active: true } };
```

Add `Active, ActiveDisabled` to the exports.

The `active` prop was added to ToolIconProps — it shows a green dot at bottom-right that flashes.

## ToolRow.stories.tsx

The existing stories should work without changes:
- `Active` story (line 25): `args: { ...Enabled.args, active: true }` — the `active` prop now flows to ToolIcon instead of rendering a Loader. The green dot should appear on the tool icon.
- `ToolList` story (line 46): has `active={t.name === 'search'}` on one row — should show green dot on the Search tool's icon.

No modifications needed to ToolRow.stories.tsx, but verify the file compiles (the old Loader import was removed from ToolRow.tsx, and stories don't import Loader directly).

Verify all stories compile by running `npm run build` (which builds the side panel). Storybook itself doesn't need to be running for the check — just ensure TypeScript is happy.
